submissions.content_text:
1.Which AI model produced better results? GPT-4o
2.Live coding experience rating (1-10, where 10 = amazing): 8
3.UI design rating (1-10, where 10 = beautiful): 7
4.Professional/enterprise-worthy rating (1-10, where 10 = very professional): 7
5.Did publishing work? yes
6.Any bugs or errors? Minor layout spacing issues on mobile preview. One instance where live coding paused briefly before continuing. No major errors during publish.
7.Improvement suggestions:
Improve mobile responsiveness by default
Add pre-built professional templates (SaaS, agency, ecommerce)
Allow manual code editing after AI generation
Add loading indicator clarity during live code generation
Improve typography consistency
8.Would you pay to use this tool? yes

- About the same result

-professionalism - 8
- Didn't work for me
- No bug of any sort
- Improvement: Speed of processing should increase
- Yes if the result suit my need
